title: Villager Forge
description: Adds a Villager Forge to the world
body:
**This mod adds a Villager Forge to the game, featuring blacksmith, toolsmith, and weaponsmith villagers inside the new forge.**

![Forge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f70fb037f886602387d2ff0f2f9b92291905c73b.jpeg)

- You’ll also find forge themed loot and low tier armor throughout the structure.
  
![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58febbaf8d693f7b08af8e624fc85f6f20842c80.jpeg)

![upstairs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e55190b8d67238c343379a1c609ea3a01f986d0.jpeg)


- The Villager Forge can spawn in Plains and Sunflower Plains biomes.


Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
